name: BION ENVIRONMENTAL TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: Bion Environmental Technologies develops and commercializes Gen3Tech, a platform integrating livestock waste treatment with nutrient recovery and renewable energy. Its core product is the Ammonia Recovery System (ARS), which extracts ammonia from animal waste, biogas, and industrial wastewater to produce fertilizer. The company targets sustainable agriculture, clean fuels, and environmental compliance markets, but currently generates no significant revenues and faces severe financial distress.

products.name: Ammonia Recovery System (ARS)
products.description: Commercial-scale system that recovers ammonia from livestock waste, biogas facilities, and industrial/municipal wastewater to produce fertilizer and control nutrient pollution.

products.name: Gen3Tech Platform
products.description: Integrated beef/livestock waste treatment platform combining ammonia recovery, nutrient management, and renewable energy production.

partnerships.description: Non-affiliated lender that provided $250,000 of a $1,500,000 bridge loan before defaulting on remaining tranches.
New York investment banking firm engaged to underwrite a capital offering; unable to complete due to SEB default.
Considered as a potential relocation site for the ARS demonstration system; not completed.
